## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's AI-powered content marketing platform and explore potential investment opportunity with Peak XV Partners.](https://fathom.video/share/pPLxNTg_5D1998sFUY-nB8fkG9m-5ato?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has built an AI-powered content marketing platform with a forward-deployed service model, achieving $11.5M+ ARR and 70%+ gross margins](https://fathom.video/share/pPLxNTg_5D1998sFUY-nB8fkG9m-5ato?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
  - [The company is serving marquee clients like Ramp, Airbyte, and Webflow, with high upsell rates and customer satisfaction](https://fathom.video/share/pPLxNTg_5D1998sFUY-nB8fkG9m-5ato?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [GrowthX is considering raising $30-50M in their next round, optimizing for the right strategic partners rather than urgency](https://fathom.video/share/pPLxNTg_5D1998sFUY-nB8fkG9m-5ato?tab=summary&timestamp=3013.0)
  - [Peak XV Partners expressed strong interest, citing their experience with successful services/platform hybrid companies and marketing tech investments](https://fathom.video/share/pPLxNTg_5D1998sFUY-nB8fkG9m-5ato?tab=summary&timestamp=3175.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Business Model and Growth

  - [Offers AI-powered content marketing as a managed service with underlying tech platform](https://fathom.video/share/pPLxNTg_5D1998sFUY-nB8fkG9m-5ato?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
  - [$11.5M+ in ARR, $2M+ signed in last 30 days](https://fathom.video/share/pPLxNTg_5D1998sFUY-nB8fkG9m-5ato?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
  - [60+ customers including Ramp, Airbyte, Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/pPLxNTg_5D1998sFUY-nB8fkG9m-5ato?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [70%+ gross margins, trending towards 74-75% by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/pPLxNTg_5D1998sFUY-nB8fkG9m-5ato?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
  - [Cashflow positive in September ($98k), biggest sales and ARR add month](https://fathom.video/share/pPLxNTg_5D1998sFUY-nB8fkG9m-5ato?tab=summary&timestamp=2694.0)
  - [No outbound marketing, first sales hire closed $3M in 6 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/pPLxNTg_5D1998sFUY-nB8fkG9m-5ato?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)

### Product and Service Offering

  - [AI-powered content creation workflows and platform](https://fathom.video/share/pPLxNTg_5D1998sFUY-nB8fkG9m-5ato?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
  - [Forward-deployed team of strategists, editors, and content creators](https://fathom.video/share/pPLxNTg_5D1998sFUY-nB8fkG9m-5ato?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
  - [Services include editorial content, programmatic content (e.g. product catalogs), newsletters](https://fathom.video/share/pPLxNTg_5D1998sFUY-nB8fkG9m-5ato?tab=summary&timestamp=2747.0)
  - [Expanding into other areas like ABM, competitive intel, product marketing](https://fathom.video/share/pPLxNTg_5D1998sFUY-nB8fkG9m-5ato?tab=summary&timestamp=2291.0)

### Customer Case Studies

  - [Ramp: 900+ pages in 14 months, driving significant organic growth](https://fathom.video/share/pPLxNTg_5D1998sFUY-nB8fkG9m-5ato?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
  - [Airbyte: Expanded from $12k to $40-45k monthly contract](https://fathom.video/share/pPLxNTg_5D1998sFUY-nB8fkG9m-5ato?tab=summary&timestamp=2747.0)
  - [Augment Code: Grew from $10k to $50k monthly across 4 workstreams](https://fathom.video/share/pPLxNTg_5D1998sFUY-nB8fkG9m-5ato?tab=summary&timestamp=2747.0)

### Team and Hiring Strategy

  - [Remote-first approach to access top talent globally](https://fathom.video/share/pPLxNTg_5D1998sFUY-nB8fkG9m-5ato?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Mix of ex-founders, CTOs, and experienced product/engineering leaders](https://fathom.video/share/pPLxNTg_5D1998sFUY-nB8fkG9m-5ato?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [40-person delivery team serving 60 clients](https://fathom.video/share/pPLxNTg_5D1998sFUY-nB8fkG9m-5ato?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
  - [Aiming for 1 person to operate 5-10 clients as efficiency improves](https://fathom.video/share/pPLxNTg_5D1998sFUY-nB8fkG9m-5ato?tab=summary&timestamp=1793.0)

### Technology Platform

  - [Custom workflows and AI agents for content creation and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/pPLxNTg_5D1998sFUY-nB8fkG9m-5ato?tab=summary&timestamp=1469.0)
  - [Internal tools for context engineering, research, and content management](https://fathom.video/share/pPLxNTg_5D1998sFUY-nB8fkG9m-5ato?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
  - [Building towards a "Content OS" that clients can eventually self-serve on](https://fathom.video/share/pPLxNTg_5D1998sFUY-nB8fkG9m-5ato?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)

### Fundraising Plans

  - [Considering $30-50M raise](https://fathom.video/share/pPLxNTg_5D1998sFUY-nB8fkG9m-5ato?tab=summary&timestamp=3117.0)
  - [Not urgently needed due to capital efficiency and profitability](https://fathom.video/share/pPLxNTg_5D1998sFUY-nB8fkG9m-5ato?tab=summary&timestamp=3013.0)
  - [Optimizing for right strategic partners over speed](https://fathom.video/share/pPLxNTg_5D1998sFUY-nB8fkG9m-5ato?tab=summary&timestamp=3013.0)
  - [HubSpot confirmed as potential strategic investor](https://fathom.video/share/pPLxNTg_5D1998sFUY-nB8fkG9m-5ato?tab=summary&timestamp=3541.0)

### Peak XV Partners' Perspective

  - [Strong interest based on past successes with services/platform hybrids (e.g. GlobalLogic, Mu Sigma)](https://fathom.video/share/pPLxNTg_5D1998sFUY-nB8fkG9m-5ato?tab=summary&timestamp=3175.0)
  - [Experience with marketing tech investments (Appier, Insider)](https://fathom.video/share/pPLxNTg_5D1998sFUY-nB8fkG9m-5ato?tab=summary&timestamp=3472.0)
  - [Alignment on long-term thinking and customer-centric approach](https://fathom.video/share/pPLxNTg_5D1998sFUY-nB8fkG9m-5ato?tab=summary&timestamp=3661.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Peak XV team to internally discuss potential investment](https://fathom.video/share/pPLxNTg_5D1998sFUY-nB8fkG9m-5ato?tab=summary&timestamp=4077.0)
  - [Follow up with Marcel and Daniel on next steps](https://fathom.video/share/pPLxNTg_5D1998sFUY-nB8fkG9m-5ato?tab=summary&timestamp=4077.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue evaluating fundraising timing and strategic fit with potential investors](https://fathom.video/share/pPLxNTg_5D1998sFUY-nB8fkG9m-5ato?tab=summary&timestamp=3013.0)
